description: CompositionRed polo T-shirt made 100% cotton, has spread collar with a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with grey piping, white panel running across the chest and brand applique on the left chestFittingRegularWash careWash and iron inside outMachine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach or tumble dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsCrafted from soft cotton fabric, this polo neck T-shirt from puma is designed to offer exemplary comfort, while the applique on the left chest oozes sporty attitude. Team it with jeans and sneakers.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
